payload.review_text:
Reviewed PLAN-AA2 against app.js (727 lines), index.html (57 lines), style.css (162 lines); linked_inputs empty. Context line-citations all verified accurate against current substrate.

VERDICT: 3 sufficiency blockers — revise before re-auditing.

BLOCKERS:
1. [Lens 1/5 — Assumptions/Freshness] renderDiff() (app.js 367-406) still appends only 3 children (speaker/ts/text) but Step 2 changes the global .segment grid to 4 columns (auto 110px 70px 1fr). Diff-view rows will shift left by one cell — visible layout break. Steps and the Step-9 regression sweep never name renderDiff(). Fix: name renderDiff() as a touched path — render a placeholder first cell there or scope the new grid template to non-diff rows.
2. [Lens 4 — Orchestration edge cases] Step 7b's popover-apply handler records its target in a NEW popoverRow global then calls restoreFocus(), but restoreFocus() (app.js 569-576) reads the EXISTING speakerModalRow global. After a popover rename, focus restoration no-ops or jumps to a stale row. Fix: either set speakerModalRow from the popover path (drop popoverRow) or parameterise restoreFocus(rowIndex) so both paths pass their own target; the PLAN must state which.
3. [Lens 4 — Orchestration edge cases] Converting showModal()->show() (Step 8a) drops native modal dismissal that current code depends on: the form method=dialog Cancel button (index.html 49), native Escape (only closes modal dialogs — a show() dialog does NOT close on Escape natively), and the close-event->restoreFocus() listener (app.js 567). Step 8c adds Escape+click-outside listeners but never reconciles them with the retained method=dialog Cancel path or confirms each dismissal fires once and restores focus to the correct row. The acceptance at line 194 asserts 'Escape, Cancel, click-outside all dismiss' — an acceptance whose mechanism isn't fully specified. Fix: Step 8 must enumerate the three dismissal paths explicitly and their focus-restoration behaviour under show().

NON-BLOCKERS: diff-mode text cells inherit the global F2 :empty outline (harmless); speaker pill title tooltip not updated for Shift/Alt advanced entry (cosmetic); two document-level click-outside listeners (popover + dialog) must not close each other on the More… transition (executor-orderable nit); Steps 2/3 split is defensible.

LENS SUMMARY: L1 Assumptions=1 blocker; L2 Validation path=clean; L3 Test fidelity=clean; L4 Orchestration=2 blockers; L5 Freshness=clean beyond #1; L6 Meta=clean (9 steps < PSZ001 threshold 12); L7 Spec-acceptance=clean; L8 Rigour H2/H4/H8=all correctly handled/skipped; L9 Audit-trail=clean.

TRIAGE: No real-judgement-calls — all 3 blockers are specification-completeness gaps the author resolves mechanically; none architectural/irreversible/shape-defining.

NET: Revise the 3 blockers and re-audit. Then sufficient to advance to plan-safety.
